creator: andrey@kostenko.name
text:
OMG... What is it? Do you want to update 0.0.6 to 0.01? Is 0.0.6 is
too new for FreeBSD repository? :-)
http://search.cpan.org/~bdfoy/IO-Interactive-0.0.6/

On Mon, Jan 11, 2010 at 5:12 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-IO-Interactive,
>
> Please note that PR ports/142642 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/142642
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
